title: helianthus longifolius
intro: Helianthus longifolius, also known as the longleaf sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The longleaf sunflower is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, supporting immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to address a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
